extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings by criminal, tax, statutory/regulatory, disciplinary and civil categories and by direction. For criminal proceedings against the listed entities, I counted the Against Company (Nil), Against Directors (2), and Against Promoters (2) rows, excluding all By rows; for statutory/regulatory proceedings I counted Against Directors (1) and Against Promoters (2), excluding tax proceedings and By rows; for tax proceedings against the company and subsidiaries, I counted the Against Company row (8), with no subsidiaries disclosed. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is ₹26.14 million; the Company has no subsidiaries, and promoter/director amounts and all By rows are excluded, giving ₹2.614 crore after conversion from million to crore. No contingent-liabilities table or figure is disclosed in the provided risk section, so no date or amount is available. The company-wide top-10 customer concentration is 27.38% for Fiscal 2024, calculated as a percentage of revenue from contract with customers; no company-wide top-5 percentage is disclosed. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10 (₹26.14 million ÷ 10 = ₹2.614 crore).
